title: RETIRED AND SENIOR VOLUNTEER PROGRAM - 211info
text: AMERICORPS SENIORS OF LINN, BENTON, AND LINCOLN COUNTIES TOLEDO OFFICE RETIRED AND SENIOR VOLUNTEER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers volunteer opportunities. Volunteers choose how, where, and how often they want to serve. They receive supplemental insurance while on duty and may be eligible for mileage reimbursement to their volunteer site. Volunteer opportunities include food pantries, advocacy, Medicare counseling, money management, meal delivery, reading with youth, tax preparation, cleaners, and more. 203 N Main Street Toledo, OR 97391 Eligibility: Age 55 and older, must pass criminal history background check Hours: Varies by service Email (541) 336-2289 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 336-2289 Main phone Main phone (541) 336-2289 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Benton, Linn, and Lincoln Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Senior Corps Volunteer Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. AMERICORPS SENIORS OF LINN, BENTON, AND LINCOLN COUNTIES TOLEDO OFFICE
